result.summary: Some answers were brief or unclear. Practice giving 1–2 minute answers with specific examples.
improvements: Give longer answers—aim for 2–3 sentences with examples.
Speak clearly and at a moderate pace.
Use the STAR method: Situation, Task, Action, Result.
Give specific examples from your experience.
Keep answers focused—2–3 minutes per question.
Show enthusiasm for the role and company.
